description: A candid press-conference photograph (no graphic design or added slogans). A man in a blue suit with a striped tie speaks at a wooden podium that bears the round 'DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE / UNITED STATES ATTORNEY' seal; he wears a small federal badge on his lapel. Behind him hangs a large matching DOJ U.S. Attorneys wall seal on a blue curtain, with U.S. and blue agency flags. A woman in a dark blazer stands to his right and another man in a suit at the far left. This documents the Massachusetts U.S. Attorney's Office announcement of the arrest of roughly two dozen Trinitarios gang members in a sweep by ICE HSI and partners, as described in the tweet. The seals are real institutional signage within a candid news photo, not designed meme graphics, so it is marked not designed. Intent is to lend official, prosecutorial gravitas to the enforcement announcement.
notable_text: DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE; UNITED STATES ATTORNEYS (official podium/wall seals, not designed text)
